title: Software Engineering Intern
description: Looking for a passionate developer to work on our core AI platform. You will build scalable microservices and optimize frontend performance.
eligibility: B.S. in Computer Science or related field.
benefits: Mentorship, Competitive Stipend, Path to Full-time

title: Investment Banking Analyst Intern
description: Assist in financial modeling, market research, and client presentations. High-paced environment requiring strong analytical skills.
eligibility: Junior or Senior in Finance, Economics, or Business.

title: AI Research Intern
description: Join our research team to explore new frontiers in reinforcement learning and natural language processing.
eligibility: M.S. or Ph.D. in AI, CS, or Physics.
benefits: Cutting-edge Research, Free Meals, Relocation Support

title: Product Design Intern
description: Craft beautiful user experiences for the next generation of mobile applications. Focus on accessibility and aesthetics.

title: Marketing & Strategy Intern
description: Analyze market trends and help execute global marketing campaigns for Cloud products.
eligibility: Enrolled in a Marketing or Communications degree.
